---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or workflow improvement for VOIDcore
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What pain point or missing capability are you running into?

## Proposed Direction

What would you like VOIDcore to do?

## Why It Fits VOIDcore

Explain how this supports the project:

- typed-document platform
- terminal-native UI
- self-hosted community infrastructure
- extension surface for docs, doors, and overlays

## Alternatives Considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Extra Context

Links, mockups, examples, or protocol notes.
